sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ كَمَالٌ فِي مَتْجَرٍ لِبَيْعِ الْمَلَابِسِ.
sentences.translationEn: Kamal works in a clothing shop.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الزَّبَائِنَ فِي اخْتِيَارِ الْمَلَابِسِ الْمُنَاسِبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pomaže kupcima u odabiru odgovarajuće odjeće.
sentences.translationEn: He helps customers choose suitable clothes.

sentences.translation: Odgovara na njihova pitanja s strpljenjem i osmijehom.
sentences.translationEn: He answers their questions with patience and a smile.

sentences.arabic: يَنْتَهِي عَمَلُهُ فِي السَّاعَةِ التَّاسِعَةِ مَسَاءً.
sentences.translation: Njegov posao završava u devet sati uveče.
sentences.translationEn: His work ends at nine o'clock in the evening.
